search.query: | inputlookup interfaces_20003_lookup | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT management_ip | eval management_ip = if(management_ip=="Unassigned", exp_ip, mvindex(management_ip, 0) ) | lookup `is_local_lookup` interfaces_lookup nfo_hostname management_ip snmp_index as ifIndex OUTPUT if_name as ifname_interfaces | eval final_interface = if(ifname_interfaces=="unknown",ifName,ifname_interfaces) | eval final_interface = if(ifName!="",ifIndex." ( ".final_interface." )",ifIndex) | table exp_ip final_interface ifIndex | eval exp_ip_search=if("$exp_ip$"=="*","null","$exp_ip$") | where exp_ip=exp_ip_search AND ifIndex!="" | dedup ifIndex sortby -str(final_interface) | appendpipe [ stats count | eval ifIndex="*" | where count==0 | fields - count ]

| `dedup_timechart_ts` | mvexpand snmps | `get_iface_name(snmp_name, snmps)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | search snmps = "$interface$" | strcat exp_ip_name "/" snmp_name exp_snmp | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ eval(sum(sum_bytes_in)*8/$span_int$/1000000) by exp_snmp useother="f"

table.title: Iterfaces by % of Use (Click on a row to see details)

search.query: | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount by exp_ip snmps nfo_hostname | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | `get_iface_name(snmp_name, snmps)` | search snmps = "$interface$" | `get_iface_speed(snmp_speed, snmps)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" snmp_name exp_snmp | eval TrafficSpeedBoth=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval percOfUsageBoth = round(TrafficSpeedBoth/(snmp_speed)*100, 2) | sort - percOfUsageBoth TrafficSpeedBoth | head 100 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps Both, TrafficSpeedBoth, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | table nfo_hostname exp_snmp "Average Mbps Both" percOfUsageBoth TrafficLine "Average Packets/s" PacketsLine | rename exp_snmp as "Device/Interface" | rename percOfUsageBoth as "% of Usage Both" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO"

table.title: Iterfaces by % of Use (Click on a row to see details)

search.query: | `tstats_20067_traffic_interface_basic("$exp_ip$","$nfo_hostname$","$advanced_filter$","$exp_group$","$span_token$")` | eval snmps=input_snmp+","+output_snmp | eval snmps=split(snmps,",") | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount by exp_ip snmps nfo_hostname | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$notbase_range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$notbase_range$ | `get_iface_name(snmp_name, snmps)` | search snmps = "$interface$" | `get_iface_speed(snmp_speed, snmps)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" snmp_name exp_snmp | eval TrafficSpeedBoth=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval percOfUsageBoth = round(TrafficSpeedBoth/(snmp_speed)*100, 2) | sort - percOfUsageBoth TrafficSpeedBoth | head 100 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps Both, TrafficSpeedBoth, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | table nfo_hostname exp_snmp "Average Mbps Both" percOfUsageBoth "Average Packets/s" | rename exp_snmp as "Device/Interface" | rename percOfUsageBoth as "% of Usage Both" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO"

table.title: Interface Traffic Details: "$Device/Interface$" reported by NFO $NFO$

search.query: | `tstats_20067_traffic_interface_basic("$exp_ip$","$NFO$","$advanced_filter$","$exp_group$","$span_token$")` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval DirectionIN=if(exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$","In","") | eval DirectionOUT=if(exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$","Out","") | eval Direction=DirectionIN+","+DirectionOUT | makemv Direction delim="," | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount by exp_ip Direction | eval TrafficSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed = TrafficSpeed/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | table Direction "Average Mbps" "Average Packets/s"

chart.title: Traffic by Direction for Device/interface "$Device/Interface$" reported by NFO $NFO$ (Click on In or Out to see network conversations below)

search.query: | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search nfo_hostname="$NFO$" ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval DirectionIN=if(exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$","In","") | eval DirectionOUT=if(exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$","Out","") | eval Direction=DirectionIN+","+DirectionOUT | makemv Direction delim="," | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ eval(sum(sum_bytes_in)*8/$span_int$/1000000) by Direction useother="f"

chart.title: Traffic by Direction for Device/interface "$Device/Interface$" reported by NFO $NFO$ (Click on In or Out to see network conversations below)

search.query: | `tstats_20067_traffic_interface_basic("$exp_ip$","$NFO$","$advanced_filter$","$exp_group$","$span_token$")` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval DirectionIN=if(exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$","In","") | eval DirectionOUT=if(exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$","Out","") | eval Direction=DirectionIN+","+DirectionOUT | makemv Direction delim="," | timechart limit=10 $notbase_span_token$ eval(sum(sum_bytes_in)*8/$notbase_span_int$/1000000) by Direction useother="f"

| `tstats_20067_traffic_complete("$exp_ip$","$NFO$","$advanced_filter$","$exp_group$","*","*","*","*","*","$span_token$")` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval exp_snmp_dir = "$Device/Interface$/$Direction$" | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name "/Out" exp_osnmp | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name "/In" exp_isnmp | where (exp_snmp_dir == exp_isnmp) OR (exp_snmp_dir == exp_osnmp) | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount sum(sum_flow_count) as Connections by src_ip dest_ip src_host dest_host src_port dest_port exp_ip | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | `format_port_column(src_port_string, src_port)` | `format_port_column(dest_port_string, dest_port)` | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | `commas_formatting(Total Connections, Connections, 0)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets, PacketsAmount, 0)` | table src_ip src_host src_port_string dest_ip dest_host dest_port_string "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" src_host as "Source Host" src_port_string as "Source Port" | rename dest_ip as "Destination IP" dest_host as "Destination Host" dest_port_string as "Destination Port"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by flow data in Metrics Summary Index created by rollup saved searches of events sent to Splunk by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10067: Top Traffic Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20067). This Module identifies hosts with the most traffic. It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol, Input interface, Output interface. This Module is packaged in NFO “Network Traffic and Devices Monitor” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
